case_title: CACH, LLC VS. CARRIE YUNG et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED JAN-11-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, ROCKY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-27-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT(S) CARRIE YUNG. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, ROCKY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LAM, ROCKY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YUNG, CARRIE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER THAT THE REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED ON MARCH 06, 2012, AGAINST CARRIE YUNG BE SET ASIDE, BECAUSE THE PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT, ETC. WAS NOT FILED.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-27-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT YUNG, CARRIE LAM, ROCKY DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-07-2013
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT YUNG, CARRIE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING - ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
